message:
fix(time): replace WallClock epoch with wall_now() in 5 more files

Same time base mismatch as happy_eyeballs.rs (633e1905): WallClock::new()
creates its own Instant::now() epoch while Sleep::poll() uses wall_now()
(START_TIME epoch). After seconds of runtime the two diverge, causing
premature or missed timeouts.

Files fixed: cx/cx.rs, net/dns/resolver.rs, service/rate_limit.rs,
service/timeout.rs, transport/stream.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
